prose:
**Frontier-orbitals gap of molecular oxygen (O₂)** — computed using density-functional theory (DFT) with the **B3LYP functional and def2-TZVP basis (tier: standard)**, in **gas phase**. Charge 0 (neutral), multiplicity 3 (triplet). Geometry from the input file `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/oxygen/oxygen.xyz` (2 atoms, O=O bond, not optimized further here). Backend: PySCF (version not stated). SCF algorithm converged in 7 cycles. Result: HOMO (highest occupied molecular orbital) energy = **−8.874 eV**, LUMO (lowest unoccupied molecular orbital) energy = **−3.586 eV**, yielding a **HOMO–LUMO gap ≈ 5.288 eV** (Koopmans-style orbital gap, not an optical excitation energy).

Live SCF output log was written to `/home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpgc7pxzz8/live.json`.
